title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0077 Land West of High Street, Stebbing
body: "All documents, excluding the hearing notice (if one is required) and decision once made, relating to this case published after 13 March 2025 will now be available on the additional documents page  Type of application: Full Planning Application  Applicant name Mark Wellings, Montare LLP  Site address: Land West of High Street, Stebbing  Description of proposed development Erection of 28 residential dwellings (comprising 14 affordable & 11 private market homes together with 3 self-build plots); provision of public open space and associated local amenity facilities (activating Local Green Space allocation); together with integrated landscaping and car parking (to include additional community parking facility)  Case Officer Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure Written Representations  Key dates      Date     Date application valid 12 February 2025   Date by when representations must be made 11 April 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target decision 18 June 2025   Decision date 11 June 2025     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 179 KB, 15 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 11 April 2025   Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others.   Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to section62a@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to  Section 62A Applications Team,Planning Inspectorate,3rd Floor, Temple Quay House,2 The Square, Temple Quay,Bristol,BS1 6PN   Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0077 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least two weeks before the date of the hearing.    All documents, excluding the hearing notice (if one is required) and decision once made, relating to this case published after 13 March 2025 will now be available on the additional documents page  Application Plans and Documents   00. Cover letter (S62A) Jan25  (PDF, 325 KB, 2 pages)  01. Application Forms FINAL (Sect 62A)  (PDF, 22.3 MB, 14 pages)  02. CIL Form Rev A  (PDF, 815 KB, 6 pages)  05. Planning...
